revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 27 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 27 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦5月27日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平]]15年（[[743年]]_月_日） - [[墾田永年私財法]]の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[寿永]]元年（[[1182年]]_月_日） - 兵乱と三合の厄を避ける為、[[寿永]]に改元 * [[永和]]元年/[[天授]]元年（[[1375年]]_月_日） - 南朝が天授に改元 * [[弘化]]3年（[[1846年]]_月_日） - アメリカの東インド艦隊司令長官ビッドルが浦賀に来航し通商を要求。幕府は拒否
== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]元年（[[1249年]]_月_日） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305年]]） * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[広瀬武夫]]、海軍軍人・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文永]]10年（[[1273年]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代執権（* [[1205年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月26日 (旧暦)|5月26日]] 翌日[[5月28日 (旧暦)|5月28日]] - 前月[[4月27日 (旧暦)|4月27日]] 翌月[[6月27日 (旧暦)|6月27日]] *新暦[[5月27日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]元年（[[1249年]]_月_日） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305年]]） * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[広瀬武夫]]、海軍軍人・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文永]]10年（[[1273年]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代執権（* [[1205年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月26日 (旧暦)|5月26日]] 翌日[[5月28日 (旧暦)|5月28日]] - 前月[[4月27日 (旧暦)|4月27日]] 翌月[[6月27日 (旧暦)|6月27日]] *新暦[[5月27日]]

revision.comment: 日付換算
revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月27日'''は[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平]]15年（[[ユリウス暦]][[743年]][[6月23日]]） - [[墾田永年私財法]]の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[寿永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1182年]][[6月29日]]） - 兵乱と[[三合]]の厄を避ける為、[[養和]]より寿永に[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]]元年/[[天授]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1375年]][[6月26日]]） - [[南朝]]が[[文中]]より天授に改元 * [[弘化]]3年（[[1846年]]_月_日）<!-- 5月27日・ユリウス暦6月20日/閏5月27日・ユリウス暦7月20日 --> - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]]の[[東インド艦隊]]司令長官ビッドルが[[浦賀]]に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]]は拒否
== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1249年]][[7月9日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305年]]） * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[7月16日]]） - [[広瀬武夫]]、[[海軍]][[軍人]]・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文永]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1273年]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[執権]]（* [[1205年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

== 忌日 == * [[文永]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1273年]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[執権]]（* [[1205年]]）

== できごと == * [[天平]]15年（[[ユリウス暦]][[743年]][[6月23日]]） - [[墾田永年私財法]]の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[寿永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1182年]][[6月29日]]） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]]を避ける為、[[養和]]より寿永に[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]]元年/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1375年]][[6月26日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[文中]]より天授に改元 * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1846年]][[7月20日]]） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]]の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]]司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビッドル]]が[[浦賀]]に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]]は拒否
== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1249年]][[7月9日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月16日]]） - [[広瀬武夫]]、[[海軍]][[軍人]]・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文永]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1273年]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[執権]]（* [[1205年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}
[[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[zh:五月廿七]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]]

== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1249年]][[7月9日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月16日]]） - [[広瀬武夫]]、[[海軍]][[軍人]]・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904年]]）

{{Lunar May}} '''Lunar May27日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平]]15年（[[ユリウス暦]][[743年]][[6月23日]]） - [[墾田永年私財法]]の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[寿永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1182年]][[6月29日]]） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]]を避ける為、[[養和]]より寿永に[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]]元年/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1375年]][[6月26日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[文中]]より天授に改元 * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1846年]][[7月20日]]） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]]の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]]司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]]が[[浦賀]]に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]]は拒否
== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1249年]][[7月9日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月16日]]） - [[広瀬武夫]]、[[海軍]][[軍人]]・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文永]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1273年]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[執権]]（* [[1205年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:旧暦May]][[sn:May 27日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

lets hope this actually works

revision.text:
'''May 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 27'''<!--Lunar May27--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平]]15年（[[ユリウス暦]][[743年]][[6月23日]]） - [[墾田永年私財法]]の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[寿永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1182年]][[6月29日]]） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]]を避ける為、[[養和]]より寿永に[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]]元年/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1375年]][[6月26日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[文中]]より天授に改元 * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1846年]][[7月20日]]） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]]の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]]司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]]が[[浦賀]]に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]]は拒否
== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1249年]][[7月9日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月16日]]） - [[広瀬武夫]]、[[海軍]][[軍人]]・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904年]]）

revision.comment: trying to comment out all the bad overview sections I made earlier
revision.text:
{{Lunar May}} {{Lunar May}} '''May 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar May}} ''May 27'''<!--Lunar May27--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[天平]]15年（[[ユリウス暦]][[743年]][[6月23日]]） - [[墾田永年私財法]]の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[寿永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1182年]][[6月29日]]） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]]を避ける為、[[養和]]より寿永に[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]]元年/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1375年]][[6月26日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[文中]]より天授に改元 * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1846年]][[7月20日]]） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]]の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]]司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]]が[[浦賀]]に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]]は拒否
== Births == * [[建長]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1249年]][[7月9日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月16日]]） - [[広瀬武夫]]、[[海軍]][[軍人]]・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904年]]）
== Deaths == * [[文永]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1273年]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[執権]]（* [[1205年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 27日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] {{citation needed}}

<!--== {{Lunar May}} ''May 27'''<!--Lunar May27 is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[天平]]15年（[[ユリウス暦]][[743年]][[6月23日]]） - [[墾田永年私財法]]の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[寿永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1182年]][[6月29日]]） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]]を避ける為、[[養和]]より寿永に[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]]元年/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1375年]][[6月26日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[文中]]より天授に改元 * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1846年]][[7月20日]]） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]]の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]]司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]]が[[浦賀]]に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]]は拒否
== Births == * [[建長]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1249年]][[7月9日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月16日]]） - [[広瀬武夫]]、[[海軍]][[軍人]]・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904年]]）
== Deaths == * [[文永]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1273年]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[執権]]（* [[1205年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[zh:五月廿七]] [[en:draft:May 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[天平]]15年（[[Julian Calendar]][[743]][[6月23日]]） - [[墾田永年私財法]]の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[寿永]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1182]][[6月29日]]） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]]を避ける為、[[養和]]より寿永に[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]]1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1375]][[6月26日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[文中]]より天授に改元 * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1846]][[7月20日]]） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]]の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]]司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]]が[[浦賀]]に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]]は拒否
== Births == * [[建長]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1249]][[7月9日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305]]） * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[7月16日]]） - [[広瀬武夫]]、[[海軍]][[軍人]]・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904]]）
== Deaths == * [[文永]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1273]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[執権]]（* [[1205]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

revision.text:
[[sn:May 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[zh:五月廿七]] [[en:draft:May 27 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[天平]]15th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[743]][[6月23日]]） - [[墾田永年私財法]]の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[寿永]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1182]][[6月29日]]） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]]を避ける為、[[養和]]より寿永に[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]]1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1375]][[6月26日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[文中]]より天授に改元 * [[弘化]]3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1846]][[7月20日]]） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]]の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]]司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]]が[[浦賀]]に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]]は拒否
== Births == * [[建長]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1249]][[7月9日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305]]） * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[7月16日]]） - [[広瀬武夫]]、[[海軍]][[軍人]]・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904]]）
== Deaths == * [[文永]]10th year（ユリウス暦[[1273]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[執権]]（* [[1205]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[天平]]15th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[743]][[6月23日]]） - [[墾田永年私財法]]の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[寿永]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1182]][[6月29日]]） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]]を避ける為、[[養和]]より寿永に[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]]1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1375]][[6月26日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[文中]]より天授に改元 * [[弘化]]3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1846]][[7月20日]]） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]]の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]]司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]]が[[浦賀]]に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]]は拒否
== Births == * [[建長]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1249]][[7月9日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305]]） * [[明治]]1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1868]][[7月16日]]） - [[広瀬武夫]]、[[海軍]][[軍人]]・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904]]）
== Deaths == * [[文永]]10th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1273]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[執権]]（* [[1205]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[6月23日]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[6月29日]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[6月26日]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[7月20日]] ） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]] の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]] 司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]] が[[浦賀]] に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]] は拒否
== Births == * [[建長]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[7月9日]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[天皇]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[7月16日]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[軍人]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文永]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1273]] [[6月13日]] ） - [[北条政村]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 7代[[執権]] （* [[1205]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[zh:五月廿七]] [[en:draft:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]] の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]] 司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]] が[[浦賀]] に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]] は拒否
== Births == * [[建長]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[July 9]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[天皇]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 16]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[軍人]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文永]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1273]] [[June 13]] ） - [[北条政村]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 7代[[執権]] （* [[1205]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

[[sn:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[zh:五月廿七]] [[en:draft:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]] の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]] 司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]] が[[浦賀]] に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]] は拒否
== Births == * [[建長]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[July 9]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[天皇]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 16]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[軍人]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文永]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1273]] [[June 13]] ） - [[北条政村]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 7代[[Shikken]] （* [[1205]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

[[sn:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[zh:五月廿七]] [[en:draft:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]] の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]] 司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]] が[[浦賀]] に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]] は拒否
== Births == * [[建長]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[July 9]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[天皇]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 16]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[軍人]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文永]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1273]] [[June 13]] ） - [[北条政村]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 7代[[Shikken]] （* [[1205]] ）
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]] の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]] 司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]] が[[浦賀]] に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]] は拒否

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[天皇]]" to "[[Emperor of Japan]]"
revision.text:
[[sn:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[zh:五月廿七]] [[en:draft:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]] の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]] 司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]] が[[浦賀]] に来航し通商を要求。[[Tokugawa shogunate|幕府]] は拒否
== Births == * [[建長]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[July 9]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 16]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[軍人]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文永]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1273]] [[June 13]] ） - [[北条政村]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 7代[[Shikken]] （* [[1205]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]] の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]] 司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]] が[[浦賀]] に来航し通商を要求。[[Tokugawa shogunate|幕府]] は拒否
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[July 9]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 16]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[軍人]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - [[United States of America|アメリカ]] の[[東India艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東India艦隊]] 司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]] が[[浦賀]] に来航し通商を要求。[[Tokugawa shogunate|幕府]] は拒否
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[July 9]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 16]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[Military Personnel]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文永]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1273]] [[June 13]] ） - [[北条政村]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 7代[[Shikken]] （* [[1205]] ）

== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James_Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[July 9]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 16]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[Military Personnel]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文永]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1273]] [[June 13]] ） - [[北条政村]] 、[[鎌倉幕府]] 7代[[Shikken]] （* [[1205]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[zh:五月廿七]] [[en:draft:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James_Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[July 9]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 16]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[Military Personnel]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文永]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1273]] [[June 13]] ） - [[北条政村]] 、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 7代[[Shikken]] （* [[1205]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James_Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[July 9]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 16]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[Military Personnel]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * [[文永]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1273]] [[June 13]] ） - [[北条政村]] 、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 7代[[Shikken]] （* [[1205]] ）
== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[zh:五月廿七]] [[en:draft:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James_Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[July 9]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 16]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[Military Personnel]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1273]] [[June 13]] ） - [[北条政村]] 、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 7代[[Shikken]] （* [[1205]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[Tenpyō]] 15th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[743]] [[June 23]] ） - [[墾田永年私財法]] の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[Juei]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1182]] [[June 29]] ） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]] を避ける為、[[養和]] よりJueiに[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]] 1st year/[[天授 (日本)|天授]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1375]] [[June 26]] ） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]] が{{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中}} より天授に改元 * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化}} 3rd year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1846]] [[July 20]] ） - The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James_Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[Kenchō]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1249]] [[July 9]] ） - [[亀山天皇]] 、90代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1305]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 16]] ） - [[広瀬武夫]] 、[[海軍]] [[Military Personnel]] ・[[日露戦争]] 初の[[軍神]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1273]] [[June 13]] ） - [[北条政村]] 、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 7代[[Shikken]] （* [[1205]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]]
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]]

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|天平}} 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[743]] [[June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * {{ill|Juei|ja|寿永}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1182]] [[June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄}} を避ける為、{{ill|Yōwa|ja|養和}} より {{ill|Juei|ja|寿永}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和}} 1st year/{{ill|Tenshu|ja|天授}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1375]] [[June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝}} が {{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中|12=draft}} より {{ill|Tenshu|ja|天授}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元}}. * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft}} 3rd year (閏5月) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1846]] [[July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral {{ill|James Biddle|ja|ジェームズ・ビドル}}, arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * {{ill|Kenchō|ja|建暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1249]] [[July 9]]) – {{ill|Kameyama Tennō|ja|亀山天皇}}, the 90th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} (died [[1305]]). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] [[July 16]]) – {{ill|Hirose Takeo|ja|広瀬武夫}}, a member of the {{ill|Navy|ja|海軍}} and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神}} during the {{ill|Russo-Japanese War|ja|日露戦争}} (died [[1904]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1273]] [[June 13]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Masamura|ja|北条政村}}, the 7th {{ill|Shikken|ja|執権}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} (born [[1205]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|天平}} 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[743]] [[June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * {{ill|Juei|ja|寿永}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1182]] [[June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄}} を避ける為、{{ill|Yōwa|ja|養和}} より {{ill|Juei|ja|寿永}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和}} 1st year/{{ill|Tenshu|ja|天授}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1375]] [[June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝}} が {{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中|12=draft}} より {{ill|Tenshu|ja|天授}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元}}. * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft}} 3rd year (閏5月) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1846]] [[July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral {{ill|James Biddle|ja|ジェームズ・ビドル}}, arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * {{ill|Kenchō|ja|建暦}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1249]] [[July 9]]) – {{ill|Kameyama Tennō|ja|亀山天皇}}, the 90th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇}} (died [[1305]]). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] [[July 16]]) – {{ill|Hirose Takeo|ja|広瀬武夫}}, a member of the {{ill|Navy|ja|海軍}} and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神}} during the {{ill|Russo-Japanese War|ja|日露戦争}} (died [[1904]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1273]] [[June 13]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Masamura|ja|北条政村}}, the 7th {{ill|Shikken|ja|執権}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} (born [[1205]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar May]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Days 27 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:May 27 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月廿七]] [[en:draft:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:May 27日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:ay 27 (Lunisolar)]]

== Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1273]] [[June 13]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Masamura|ja|北条政村}}, the 7th {{ill|Shikken|ja|執権}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} (born [[1205]]).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|天平|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[743]] [[June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|12=draft}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * {{ill|Juei|ja|寿永|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1182]] [[June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|12=draft}} を避ける為、{{ill|Yōwa|ja|養和|12=draft}} より {{ill|Juei|ja|寿永|12=draft}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Tenshu|ja|天授|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1375]] [[June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|12=draft}} が {{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中|12=draft|12=draft}} より {{ill|Tenshu|ja|天授|12=draft}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year (閏5月) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1846]] [[July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral {{ill|James Biddle|ja|ジェームズ・ビドル|12=draft}}, arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * {{ill|Kenchō|ja|建暦|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1249]] [[July 9]]) – {{ill|Kameyama Tennō|ja|亀山天皇|12=draft}}, the 90th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇|12=draft}} (died [[1305]]). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] [[July 16]]) – {{ill|Hirose Takeo|ja|広瀬武夫|12=draft}}, a member of the {{ill|Navy|ja|海軍|12=draft}} and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|12=draft}} during the {{ill|Russo-Japanese War|ja|日露戦争|12=draft}} (died [[1904]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1273]] [[June 13]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Masamura|ja|北条政村|12=draft}}, the 7th {{ill|Shikken|ja|執権|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft}} (born [[1205]]).

revision.text:
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|ja|天平|12=draft}} 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[743]] [[June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|12=draft}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * {{ill|Juei|ja|寿永|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1182]] [[June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|12=draft}} を避ける為、{{ill|Yōwa|ja|養和|12=draft}} より {{ill|Juei|ja|寿永|12=draft}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Tenshu|ja|天授|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1375]] [[June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|12=draft}} が {{ill|Bunchū|ja|文中|12=draft|12=draft}} より {{ill|Tenshu|ja|天授|12=draft}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kōka|ja|弘化|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year (閏5月) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1846]] [[July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral {{ill|James Biddle|ja|ジェームズ・ビドル|12=draft}}, arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * {{ill|Kenchō|ja|建暦|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1249]] [[July 9]]) – {{ill|Kameyama Tennō|ja|亀山天皇|12=draft}}, the 90th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|天皇|12=draft}} (died [[1305]]). * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] [[July 16]]) – {{ill|Hirose Takeo|ja|広瀬武夫|12=draft}}, a member of the {{ill|Navy|ja|海軍|12=draft}} and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|12=draft}} during the {{ill|Russo-Japanese War|ja|日露戦争|12=draft}} (died [[1904]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|ja|文永|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1273]] [[June 13]]) – {{ill|Hōjō Masamura|ja|北条政村|12=draft}}, the 7th {{ill|Shikken|ja|執権|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft}} (born [[1205]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿七]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar May]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Days 27 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]]
}} [[sn:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 27일]] [[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月廿七]] [[en:draft:May 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:May 27日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:ay 27 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:May 27 (Lunisolar)]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月27日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の27日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[天平]]15年（[[ユリウス暦]][[743年]][[6月23日]]） - [[墾田永年私財法]]の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可 * [[寿永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1182年]][[6月29日]]） - 兵乱と[[三合の厄]]を避ける為、[[養和]]より寿永に[[改元]] * [[永和 (日本)|永和]]元年/[[天授 (日本)|天授]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1375年]][[6月26日]]） - [[南朝 (日本)|南朝]]が[[文中]]より天授に改元 * [[弘化]]3年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1846年]][[7月20日]]） - [[アメリカ合衆国|アメリカ]]の[[東インド艦隊 (アメリカ海軍)|東インド艦隊]]司令長官[[ジェームズ・ビドル]]が[[浦賀]]に来航し通商を要求。[[江戸幕府|幕府]]は拒否
== 誕生日 == * [[建長]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1249年]][[7月9日]]） - [[亀山天皇]]、90代[[天皇]]（+ [[1305年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[7月16日]]） - [[広瀬武夫]]、[[海軍]][[軍人]]・[[日露戦争]]初の[[軍神]]（+ [[1904年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文永]]10年（ユリウス暦[[1273年]][[6月13日]]） - [[北条政村]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]7代[[執権]]（* [[1205年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839551]] Wikidata name: 27th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 27|qq=May 27}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konten Einnei Shizaihō|qq=|1=Konden Einen Shizai Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389478}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1182|1182]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangō no Yaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を避ける為、[[:en:Yōwa|Yōwa]] より [[:en:Juei|Juei]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|qq=|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11131293}} 1st year/[[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1375|1375]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court|qq=}} が [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū]] より [[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year (閏5月) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:July 20|July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Kameyama Tennō]], the 90th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1305|1305]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 16|July 16]]) – [[:en:Hirose Takeo|Hirose Takeo]], a member of the [[:en:Navy|Navy]] and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military Deity|qq=|1=gunshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637440}} during the [[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] (died [[:en:1904|1904]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1273|1273]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Masamura|Hōjō Masamura]], the 7th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (born [[:en:1205|1205]]).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839551]] Wikidata name: 27th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 27|qq=May 27}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konten Einnei Shizaihō|qq=|1=Konden Einen Shizai Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389478}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1182|1182]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangō no Yaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を避ける為、[[:en:Yōwa|Yōwa]] より [[:en:Juei|Juei]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|qq=|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11131293}} 1st year/[[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1375|1375]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court|qq=}} が [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū]] より [[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year (閏5月) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:July 20|July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Kameyama Tennō]], the 90th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1305|1305]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 16|July 16]]) – [[:en:Hirose Takeo|Hirose Takeo]], a member of the [[:en:Navy|Navy]] and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military Deity|qq=|1=gunshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637440}} during the [[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] (died [[:en:1904|1904]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1273|1273]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Masamura|Hōjō Masamura]], the 7th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (born [[:en:1205|1205]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konten Einnei Shizaihō|qq=|1=Konden Einen Shizai Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389478}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1182|1182]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangō no Yaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を避ける為、[[:en:Yōwa|Yōwa]] より [[:en:Juei|Juei]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|qq=|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11131293}} 1st year/[[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1375|1375]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court|qq=}} が [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū]] より [[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year (閏5月) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:July 20|July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Kameyama Tennō]], the 90th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1305|1305]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 16|July 16]]) – [[:en:Hirose Takeo|Hirose Takeo]], a member of the [[:en:Navy|Navy]] and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military Deity|qq=|1=gunshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637440}} during the [[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] (died [[:en:1904|1904]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1273|1273]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Masamura|Hōjō Masamura]], the 7th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (born [[:en:1205|1205]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konten Einnei Shizaihō|qq=|1=Konden Einen Shizai Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389478}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1182|1182]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangō no Yaku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を避ける為、[[:en:Yōwa|Yōwa]] より [[:en:Juei|Juei]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|qq=|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11131293}} 1st year/[[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1375|1375]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court|qq=}} が [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū]] より [[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year (閏5月) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:July 20|July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Kameyama Tennō]], the 90th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1305|1305]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 16|July 16]]) – [[:en:Hirose Takeo|Hirose Takeo]], a member of the [[:en:Navy|Navy]] and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military Deity|qq=|1=gunshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637440}} during the [[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] (died [[:en:1904|1904]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1273|1273]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Masamura|Hōjō Masamura]], the 7th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (born [[:en:1205|1205]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konten Einnei Shizaihō|1=Konden Einen Shizai Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389478}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1182|1182]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangō no Yaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を避ける為、[[:en:Yōwa|Yōwa]] より [[:en:Juei|Juei]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11131293}} 1st year/[[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1375|1375]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court|qq=}} が [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū]] より [[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year (閏5月) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:July 20|July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Kameyama Tennō]], the 90th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1305|1305]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 16|July 16]]) – [[:en:Hirose Takeo|Hirose Takeo]], a member of the [[:en:Navy|Navy]] and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military Deity|1=gunshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637440}} during the [[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] (died [[:en:1904|1904]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1273|1273]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Masamura|Hōjō Masamura]], the 7th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (born [[:en:1205|1205]]).

== Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Kameyama Tennō]], the 90th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1305|1305]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 16|July 16]]) – [[:en:Hirose Takeo|Hirose Takeo]], a member of the [[:en:Navy|Navy]] and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military Deity|1=gunshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637440}} during the [[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] (died [[:en:1904|1904]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1273|1273]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Masamura|Hōjō Masamura]], the 7th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (born [[:en:1205|1205]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿七]][[zh:五月廿七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839551]] Wikidata name: 27th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 27|qq=May 27}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konten Einnei Shizaihō|1=Konden Einen Shizai Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389478}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1182|1182]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangō no Yaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を避ける為、[[:en:Yōwa|Yōwa]] より [[:en:Juei|Juei]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11131293}} 1st year/[[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1375|1375]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court|qq=}} が [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū]] より [[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year (閏5月) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:July 20|July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Kameyama Tennō]], the 90th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1305|1305]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 16|July 16]]) – [[:en:Hirose Takeo|Hirose Takeo]], a member of the [[:en:Navy|Navy]] and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military Deity|1=gunshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637440}} during the [[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] (died [[:en:1904|1904]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1273|1273]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Masamura|Hōjō Masamura]], the 7th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (born [[:en:1205|1205]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konten Einnei Shizaihō|1=Konden Einen Shizai Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389478}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1182|1182]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangō no Yaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を避ける為、[[:en:Yōwa|Yōwa]] より [[:en:Juei|Juei]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11131293}} 1st year/[[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1375|1375]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court|qq=}} が [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū]] より [[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year (閏5月) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:July 20|July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Kameyama Tennō]], the 90th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1305|1305]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 16|July 16]]) – [[:en:Hirose Takeo|Hirose Takeo]], a member of the [[:en:Navy|Navy]] and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military Deity|1=gunshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637440}} during the [[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] (died [[:en:1904|1904]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1273|1273]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Masamura|Hōjō Masamura]], the 7th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (born [[:en:1205|1205]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konten Einnei Shizaihō|1=Konden Einen Shizai Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389478}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1182|1182]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangō no Yaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を避ける為、[[:en:Yōwa|Yōwa]] より [[:en:Juei|Juei]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11131293}} 1st year/[[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1375|1375]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court|qq=}} が [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū]] より [[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year (閏5月) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:July 20|July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Kameyama Tennō]], the 90th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1305|1305]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 16|July 16]]) – [[:en:Hirose Takeo|Hirose Takeo]], a member of the [[:en:Navy|Navy]] and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military Deity|1=gunshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637440}} during the [[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] (died [[:en:1904|1904]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1273|1273]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Masamura|Hōjō Masamura]], the 7th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (born [[:en:1205|1205]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 15th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:743|743]] [[:en:June 23|June 23]]) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konten Einnei Shizaihō|1=Konden Einen Shizai Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389478}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1182|1182]] [[:en:June 29|June 29]]) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangō no Yaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を避ける為、[[:en:Yōwa|Yōwa]] より [[:en:Juei|Juei]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11131293}} 1st year/[[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1375|1375]] [[:en:June 26|June 26]]) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court|qq=}} が [[:en:Bunchū|Bunchū]] より [[:en:Tianshou|Tenshu]] に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Kōka|Kōka]] 3rd year (閏5月) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1846|1846]] [[:en:July 20|July 20]]) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral [[:en:James Biddle|James Biddle]], arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * [[:en:Kenryaku|Kenchō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1249|1249]] [[:en:July 9|July 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kameyama|Kameyama Tennō]], the 90th [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (died [[:en:1305|1305]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 16|July 16]]) – [[:en:Hirose Takeo|Hirose Takeo]], a member of the [[:en:Navy|Navy]] and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military Deity|1=gunshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637440}} during the [[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] (died [[:en:1904|1904]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1273|1273]] [[:en:June 13|June 13]]) – [[:en:Hōjō Masamura|Hōjō Masamura]], the 7th [[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] of the [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] (born [[:en:1205|1205]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿七]][[zh:五月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿七]][[zh:五月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿七]][[zh:五月廿七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839551]] Wikidata name: 27th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 27|qq=May 27}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|WD=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō}} 15th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|743|en|743|WD=Q23604|lt=743}} {{ill|June 23|en|June 23|WD=Q2668|lt=June 23}}) – {{ill|Konten Einnei Shizaihō|ja|墾田永年私財法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Konten Einnei Shizaihō|1=Konden Einen Shizai Law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4389478}} の勅令。開墾した土地の私有を許可. * {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|WD=Q598057|lt=Juei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1182|en|1182|WD=Q19708|lt=1182}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|WD=Q2659|lt=June 29}}) – 兵乱と {{ill|Sangō no Yaku|ja|三合の厄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sangō no Yaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} を避ける為、{{ill|Yōwa|en|Yōwa|WD=Q729609|lt=Yōwa}} より {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|WD=Q598057|lt=Juei}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Eiwa|ja|永和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiwa|1=Eiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11131293}} 1st year/{{ill|Tianshou|en|Tianshou|WD=Q10939676|lt=Tenshu}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1375|en|1375|WD=Q6277|lt=1375}} {{ill|June 26|en|June 26|WD=Q2661|lt=June 26}}) – {{ill|Southern Court|ja|南朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Southern Court|qq=}} が {{ill|Bunchū|en|Bunchū|WD=Q1194181|lt=Bunchū}} より {{ill|Tianshou|en|Tianshou|WD=Q10939676|lt=Tenshu}} に {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|WD=Q1325317|lt=Kōka}} 3rd year (閏5月) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1846|en|1846|WD=Q7640|lt=1846}} {{ill|July 20|en|July 20|WD=Q2728|lt=July 20}}) – The American East India Squadron commander, Admiral {{ill|James Biddle|en|James Biddle|WD=Q3129637|lt=James Biddle}}, arrives in Uraga and requests trade. The shogunate refuses.
== Births == * {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|WD=Q1194260|lt=Kenchō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1249|en|1249|WD=Q5485|lt=1249}} {{ill|July 9|en|July 9|WD=Q2690|lt=July 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kameyama|en|Emperor Kameyama|WD=Q360972|lt=Kameyama Tennō}}, the 90th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1305|en|1305|WD=Q5624|lt=1305}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|July 16|en|July 16|WD=Q2731|lt=July 16}}) – {{ill|Hirose Takeo|en|Hirose Takeo|WD=Q711769|lt=Hirose Takeo}}, a member of the {{ill|Navy|en|Navy|WD=Q4508|lt=Navy}} and a military personnel who became known as the first {{ill|Military Deity|ja|軍神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military Deity|1=gunshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637440}} during the {{ill|Russo-Japanese War|en|Russo-Japanese War|WD=Q159950|lt=Russo-Japanese War}} (died {{ill|1904|en|1904|WD=Q2046|lt=1904}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1273|en|1273|WD=Q5526|lt=1273}} {{ill|June 13|en|June 13|WD=Q2614|lt=June 13}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Masamura|en|Hōjō Masamura|WD=Q2408959|lt=Hōjō Masamura}}, the 7th {{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|WD=Q1045904|lt=Shikken}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|WD=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate}} (born {{ill|1205|en|1205|WD=Q5229|lt=1205}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|26|5|28|4|27|6|5|0527|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
